description: A POP describes a reference to a POP operator, containing points and primitives.

members.name: dimension
members.description: The dimension in this POP. This value updates independently of time dependent content.

members.name: maxVertsPerLineStrip
members.description: The max number of verts per line strip in this POP.

members.name: pointAttributes
members.description: The set of point attributes defined in this POP.

members.name: pointAttributesChanged
members.description: The point attributes changed by this POP.

members.name: primAttributes
members.description: The set of primitive attributes defined in this POP.

members.name: primAttributesChanged
members.description: The prim attributes changed by this POP.

members.name: vertAttributes
members.description: The set of vertex attributes defined in this POP.

members.name: vertAttributesChanged
members.description: The vert attributes changed by this POP.

methods.name: bounds
methods.description: Returns an object with the bounds, center and size of the POP's geometry. * delayed - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed until the next call to bounds(), avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately.

methods.name: computeBounds
methods.description: Returns an object with the bounds, center and size of the POP's geometry. * display - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, only calculate Bounding Box if POP display flag is set. * render - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, only calculate Bounding Box if POP render flag is set. * delayed - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed until the next call to computeBounds(), avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately.

methods.name: numPoints
methods.description: Returns the number of points contained in this POP. * delayed - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed until the next call to numPoints(), avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately. * max - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, returns the number of allocated points (max number of points). In that case result is always instant, delayed is disregarded.

methods.name: numPrims
methods.description: Returns the number of primitives contained in this POP. * delayed - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed until the next call to numPrims(), avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately. * max - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, returns the number of allocated primitives (max number of primitives). In that case result is always instant, delayed is disregarded. * primType - (Keyword, Optional) If set to triangles, quads, lineStrips, lines or pointPrims, returns the number of primitives for that primitive type only.

methods.name: numVerts
methods.description: Returns the number of vertices contained in this POP. * delayed - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed until the next call to numVerts(), avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately. * max - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, returns the number of allocated vertices (max number of verts). In that case result is always instant, delayed is disregarded. * lineStrips - (Keyword, Optional) If set to true, returns the number of verts for line strips only.

methods.name: pointItr
methods.description: Only supported in the parameters of some POPs. Returns an object that will return a different value for each output element, using the output index to lookup into the attribute referenced. * attributeName - The attribute name. * compIndex - The component index within the attribute to use. * pointIndex - (Keyword, Optional) The point index to use (optional).

methods.name: point
methods.description: Returns the point attribute value. * attributeName - The attribute name. * index - The point index. * delayed - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed until the next call to vals(), avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately.

methods.name: points
methods.description: Returns the point attribute values as a list. * attributeName - The attribute name. * startIndex - (Keyword, Optional )The point index to start at (default 0). * count - (Keyword, Optional) The number of points to download. A value of -1 fetches all elements from the start index onward. * delayed - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed until the next call to vals(), avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately.

methods.name: primItr
methods.description: Only supported in the parameters of some POPs. Returns an object that will return a different value for each output element, using the output index to lookup into the attribute referenced. * attributeName - The attribute name. * compIndex - The component index within the attribute to use. * primIndex - (Keyword, Optional) The primitive index to use (optional).

methods.name: prim
methods.description: Returns the primitive attribute value. * attributeName - The attribute name. * index - The prim index. * delayed - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed until the next call to vals(), avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately.

methods.name: prims
methods.description: Returns the primitive attribute values as a list. * attributeName - The attribute name. * startIndex - (Keyword, Optional )The primitive index to start at (default 0). * count - (Keyword, Optional) The number of primitives to download. A value of -1 fetches all elements from the start index onward. * delayed - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed until the next call to vals(), avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately.

methods.name: reallocate
methods.description: Forces the POP to reallocate its GPU buffers.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Save the POP geometry to file system. Multiple file types are supported. Returns the filename and path saved. * filepath - (Optional) The path and filename to save to. If not given then a default filename will be used, and the file will be saved in the project.folder folder. * createFolders - (Keyword, Optional) If True, it creates the not existent directories provided by the filepath.

methods.name: vertItr
methods.description: Only supported in the parameters of some POPs. Returns an object that will return a different value for each output element, using the output index to lookup into the attribute referenced. * attributeName - The attribute name. * compIndex - The component index within the attribute to use. * vertIndex - (Keyword, Optional) The vertex index to use (optional).

methods.name: vert
methods.description: Returns the vertex attribute value. * attributeName - The attribute name. * index - The vertex index. * delayed - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed until the next call to vals(), avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately.

methods.name: verts
methods.description: Returns the vertex attribute values as a list. * attributeName - The attribute name. * startIndex - (Keyword, Optional )The vertex index to start at (default 0). * count - (Keyword, Optional) The number of vertices to download. A value of -1 fetches all elements from the start index onward. * delayed - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed until the next call to vals(), avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the POP Class wiki page
